    ForgeryDetector.authenticityScore(ForgeryDetector.BrushstrokeProfile sample, ForgeryDetector.ArtistFingerprint fingerprint)

    ForgeryDetector.detectAnomalies(ForgeryDetector.BrushstrokeProfile sample, ForgeryDetector.ArtistFingerprint fingerprint)
